notes: New evidence invalidates the live consequence rail before submit or downstream launch may continue.
Safety posture change freezes consequence immediately.
Attach or separation changes invalidate prior approval and preview truth.
Approval mismatch preserves preview but blocks live consequence.
Policy tuple drift downgrades the rail without discarding provenance.
Publication mismatch keeps the shell but freezes consequence controls.
Trust downgrade leaves stale context visible as provenance only.
Identity drift blocks consequence on the old epoch.
Ownership epoch drift revokes writable consequence posture.
Reopen creates a replacement path instead of retargeting the old preview.
Manual replacement keeps the stale rail visible but no longer writable.
